file_validation.validation_message: Unknown file type - no matching magic bytes

filesystem_detection.message: Could not determine data offset for container type

wipe_indicators.error: blkls not found - ensure The Sleuth Kit is installed
wipe_indicators.note: Wipe pattern detection could not be performed.

recommendations: HIGH PRIORITY: Highly suspicious region at offset 0x21000. This region has very high entropy (7.85) and anomaly score (100.0), indicating likely encrypted or hidden data. Consider further analysis with cryptographic tools.
Very high maximum entropy detected (>7.8). Strong indicator of encrypted content or VeraCrypt hidden volume.

findings.why_it_matters: Normal entropy levels suggest unencrypted data.
Timestamp or metadata mismatches can indicate timestomping, cloning artifacts, or anti-forensic manipulation.
Structured overwrite patterns can indicate intentional destruction or sanitization of evidence.
Deletion bursts can be normal cleanup or deliberate post-incident anti-forensic behavior.
Suspicious low-entropy slack regions may indicate hidden payloads or tampering in slack space.
A few high-entropy regions may be normal (e.g., compressed files).

wipeIndicators.error: blkls not found - ensure The Sleuth Kit is installed
wipeIndicators.note: Wipe pattern detection could not be performed.
